metadata.content: The NYSE-OKX deal puts a legacy giant right at the heart of the digital asset world. The bridge between Wall Street and Web3 just got stronger.
Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), the owner of the NYSE, acquired a stake in the crypto exchange OKX at a $25 billion valuation
The Neo uses a mobile processor (comparable to the iPhone 16 Pro) rather than the high-end M5 chip, targeting the Chromebook and budget Windows PC markets
Apple unveiled the MacBook Neo, starting at $599—roughly $400 cheaper than its standard entry-level laptops
Experts suggest that while AI will automate many tasks, it is currently "augmenting" rather than "replacing" most human roles, though entry-level developer positions are seeing a significant impact
Scientific knowledge is disseminated through scientific articles, where data and metadata are described in natural language, rendering comparative analysis of experiments very difficult.
With computational power constantly accelerating, we find that bottlenecks for analyzing scientific data lie not in the availability of said power, but in the availability of the data for analysis.
The NASDAQ 100 and S&P 500 both dropped nearly 2% as investors pivoted to a "risk-off" mentality
Rising energy prices have led markets to anticipate that the Federal Reserve will be unable to cut interest rates in an inflationary environment
Crude oil experienced its biggest move since 2022, with WTI hitting $77 and Brent surging to $85 due to threats against energy infrastructure in the Middle East and blockages in the Strait of Hormuz
The NASDAQ 100 and S&P 500 both dropped nearly 2% as investors pivoted to a "risk-off" mentality
